---

### 🚀 What I do

- **AI-integrated marketing workflows** — I build content pipelines with Claude, ChatGPT, Ideogram & Reframer that cut design-to-publish cycles by up to **60%**.
- **Performance marketing** — Meta Ads & Google Ads with full budget management, A/B testing, and month-on-month ROAS growth.
- **SEO & analytics** — technical + on-page SEO, GA4, Core Web Vitals (drove a **45%** Core Web Vitals improvement on my own D2C brand).
- **E-commerce** — Amazon Brand Store, A+ content, SEO product listings, and Shopify/WordPress storefronts.
- **Web & front-end** — I design *and* build: HTML/CSS/JS, Tailwind, Bootstrap, Shopify Liquid, WordPress.
